tasks.output_preview: Hub health probe is live with cooldown-based restart logic and JSONL logging in scripts/hub_health_probe.py.

tasks.description: SimulatedVerse degraded mode with static client and readiness endpoints
tasks.output_preview: Degraded SimulatedVerse mode is live with static client serving, /api/health, /healthz, /readyz, and startup fallback/daemon wiring.

tasks.description: NuSyQ bridge state reconciliation and ready-state semantics
tasks.output_preview: Bridge readiness semantics are aligned: /livez is liveness, /readyz is bridge readiness, and the port map advertises the correct bridge health surface.

tasks.description: Terminal Depths explorer playbook and hidden-trigger capture
tasks.output_preview: Explorer and completionist playbook artifacts exist in state/playbook.json, state/playbook.md, and state/playbook_completionist.json.

tasks.description: Port map and health endpoint standardization across ecosystem
tasks.output_preview: Verified the manifest/helper pair already align on bridge health truth: port_map advertises /health and the shared helper keeps /api/health as an alias.

tasks.description: Orchestrator spawn-agent task type and persistent-worker loop
tasks.output_preview: Added spawn_agent dispatch support in scripts/dispatch_task.py, including role inference, /api/swarm/spawn routing, task-file result updates, and focused pytest coverage for spawn-agent task completion.

tasks.description: Add Terminal Depths playbook command that reads machine-readable hint data
tasks.output_preview: Verified the playbook command is already implemented end-to-end in app/game_engine/commands.py and reads state/playbook.json correctly.

tasks.description: Wire Hub health listener into orchestrator task gating
tasks.output_preview: Added scripts/health_listener.py and updated agents/orchestrator.py to pause pending-task execution when the latest Hub probe is classified as critical.

tasks.description: Review and compile RimWorld chat adapter bridge patch
tasks.output_preview: Reviewed the RimWorld chat adapter, fixed the Harmony postfix parameter binding to use ref for the documented out arguments, and kept the compile/toolchain gap tracked separately under T1001B.

tasks.description: Compile and smoke-test generated RimWorld mod scaffold
tasks.output_preview: Verified the local Windows dotnet toolchain and RimWorld/Harmony references are present, built TerminalKeeper.EventBridge.csproj successfully with /mnt/c/Program Files/dotnet/dotnet.exe, and confirmed TerminalKeeper.EventBridge.dll lands in rimworld_mod/Assemblies.

tasks.description: Add focused tests for NuSyQ-Hub health and status endpoint semantics
tasks.output_preview: Added focused NuSyQ-Hub tests for status/health semantics, aligned stale set-status expectations with the current API contract, and fixed Python 3.10 UTC compatibility blockers so the targeted suite passes.

tasks.description: Make SimulatedVerse full server resilient to missing textures instead of falling back immediately
tasks.output_preview: Verified the full-server import path completes in about 52s on the Windows-backed workspace, raised startup_fallback.ts to a realistic 75s default full-startup timeout, and confirmed the fallback script brings a separate instance healthy on :5004 without dropping to degraded mode. Degraded mode remains available as a true fallback, but the full server is now a validated slow-start path rather than a false stall.
